Container.Name: Immich-HEIC
Container.Overview: Dashboard and nightly sidecar for safely converting Immich HEIC/HEIF assets to JPG through the public Immich API. Originals are not modified or deleted.

Config.Name: State Storage
Config.Description: Persistent state, recent run history, and idempotency tracking.

Config.Name: Immich API URL
Config.Description: Immich API URL. Use a reachable URL from this container, such as http://immich:2283/api on a shared Docker network.

Config.Name: Immich API Key
Config.Description: Immich API key with asset read and asset upload permissions.

Config.Name: Dry Run
Config.Description: When true, scans and reports planned work without converting or uploading. Change to false after you trust the dry-run output.

Config.Name: Daily Scan Time
Config.Description: Local 24-hour time for the automatic scan.

Config.Name: Run On Start
Config.Description: Run a scan when the container starts. Leave false for cautious unattended operation.

Config.Name: Timezone
Config.Description: Container timezone used for the daily scan time.

Config.Name: Preserve Metadata
Config.Description: Copy EXIF/IPTC/XMP metadata from the source HEIC/HEIF into the uploaded JPG when possible.

Config.Name: Remote Duplicate Check
Config.Description: Search Immich for the expected JPG filename before converting.

Config.Name: Page Size
Config.Description: Immich API search page size. Maximum is 1000.

Config.Name: Max Assets
Config.Description: Maximum HEIC/HEIF assets to process per run. 0 means no limit. Useful for testing with 1 or 5.
